channel.title: mesheryctl-system-channel on Documentation
channel.description: Recent content in mesheryctl-system-channel on Documentation

item.title: mesheryctl-system-channel-set
item.description:
mesheryctl system channel set

set release channel and version

Synopsis

Set release channel and version of context in focus


mesheryctl system channel set [stable|stable-version|edge|edge-version] [flags]

Examples

Subscribe to release channel or version


mesheryctl system channel set [stable|stable-version|edge|edge-version]

Options 


 -h, --help help for set

Options inherited from parent commands 


 --config string path to config file (default "/home/runner/.meshery/config.yaml")
 -c, --context string (optional) temporarily change the current context.
 -v, --verbose verbose output
 -y, --yes (optional) assume yes for user interactive prompts.

See Also

Go back to command reference index, if you want to add content manually to the CLI documentation, please refer to the instruction for guidance.

item.title: mesheryctl-system-channel-switch
item.description:
mesheryctl system channel switch

switch release channel and version

Synopsis

Switch release channel and version of context in focus


mesheryctl system channel switch [stable|stable-version|edge|edge-version] [flags]

Examples

Switch between release channels


mesheryctl system channel switch [stable|stable-version|edge|edge-version]

Options 


 -h, --help help for switch

Options inherited from parent commands 


 --config string path to config file (default "/home/runner/.meshery/config.yaml")
 -c, --context string (optional) temporarily change the current context.
 -v, --verbose verbose output
 -y, --yes (optional) assume yes for user interactive prompts.

See Also

Go back to command reference index, if you want to add content manually to the CLI documentation, please refer to the instruction for guidance.

item.title: mesheryctl-system-channel-view
item.description:
mesheryctl system channel view

view release channel and version

Synopsis

View release channel and version of context in focus


mesheryctl system channel view [flags]

Examples

View current release channel


mesheryctl system channel view edge

View release channel for all contexts


mesheryctl system channel view --all

Options 


 -a, --all Show release channel for all contexts
 -h, --help help for view

Options inherited from parent commands 


 --config string path to config file (default "/home/runner/.meshery/config.yaml")
 -c, --context string (optional) temporarily change the current context.
 -v, --verbose verbose output
 -y, --yes (optional) assume yes for user interactive prompts.

See Also

Go back to command reference index, if you want to add content manually to the CLI documentation, please refer to the instruction for guidance.
